zh.Muskerry, Cork, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克
zh.Cork, County Cork, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery於1470年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克時，他的父親Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery31歲，母親Lady Catherine FitzGerald15歲。他於大約1507年與Lady Eleanor FitzGerald結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery于1470年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克时，他的父亲Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery31岁，母亲Lady Catherine FitzGerald15岁。他于大约1507年与Lady Eleanor FitzGerald结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Reagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ute.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Riabhach, which MacLysaght describes as an adjectival surname (meaning ‘gray’ or ‘brindled’) that ‘took the place of an hereditary one’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Rech  .

variants.name: Rech
meanings: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Recho, a short form of a personal name composed with rāhha ‘revenge’.

nameMeanings.name: Donal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery was born in 1470, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery, was 31 and his mother, Lady Catherine FitzGerald, was 15. He married Lady Eleanor FitzGerald about 1507. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1540, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery est né en 1470, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine FitzGerald, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor FitzGerald environ 1507. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery 1470 in Cork, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery 31 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine FitzGerald 15. Er hat um 1507 Lady Eleanor FitzGerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1540 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery è nato il nel 1470 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine FitzGerald, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor FitzGerald circa 1507. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carberyが1470年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで生まれた時，父Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carberyは31歳，母Lady Catherine FitzGeraldは15歳であった。約1507年にLady Eleanor FitzGeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery(이)가 1470년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine FitzGerald(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1507년 Lady Eleanor FitzGerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery nasceu em 1470, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine FitzGerald, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor FitzGerald aproximadamente 1507. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery родился в 1470 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine FitzGerald, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor FitzGerald около 1507 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1540 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery nació en 1470, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine FitzGerald, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Lady Eleanor FitzGerald aproximadamente 1507. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
